title: The Kingdom Counts the Cost
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 13, this part focuses on a kingdom wakes from war. Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
scene: This scene belongs to the A Kingdom Wakes from War sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Luffy, Vivi, King Cobra, Nico Robin.
summary: Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
